title: Status Column Selections Not Populating
excerpt: I’m trying to create a custom integration between Monday and my API. I created an app and created a custom action to just send a request to my API when an item’s status changes. After installing the app and trying to add…

posts.author: noah.h (noah hornak)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to create a custom integration between Monday and my API. I created an app and created a custom action to just send a request to my API when an item’s status changes. After installing the app and trying to add the workflow to my board, I’m presented with the following popup screen to setup the recipe with my custom action however, when I try to select the ‘status’ column in order to define which column, I don’t get any options available and it seems like the columns aren’t getting populated in the dropdown

image1590×874 18.4 KB

Here is my custom action

image657×706 25 KB

image669×603 29.4 KB

And my recipe

image576×527 11.4 KB

Also, the app scopes

Am I doing something wrong in my configuration or are the input and output fields incorrect?
Any help will be greatly appreciated!
